Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment And For Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ACT NOW TO STOP WAR AND END RACISM'S ("ANSWER") MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. Appearances: Ben Rosenfeld (285.8091) for petitioner and moving party; Wayne K. Snodgrass of the Office of the City Attorney (554.4675) for respondent and opposing party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: motion denied. Respondent to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment And For Attorneys' Fees And Costs

MINI MINUTES:
